title: pouteria bilocularis
intro: Pouteria bilocularis, also known as the White Guanacaste or White Cochlospermum, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pouteria bilocularis include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pouteria bilocularis typically involve boiling the roots or leaves in water to create a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
